title: ECP5 and Xilinx synthesis hits issue in kernel/rtlil.cc:867
body:
We are hitting an issue in yosys when building the rotator in microwatt. To make it easier to reproduce, I've converted the VHDL to Verilog by passing it through yosys.

To reproduce:

```
yosys -p "read_verilog rotator.v; synth_ecp5"
```

Which hits:

```
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \rotator.$auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A_conv ($pos) at kernel/rtlil.cc:867:
  attribute \module_not_derived 1
  attribute \src "/home/anton_unencrypted/yosys/share/ecp5/arith_map.v:39.69-39.94"
  cell $pos $auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A_conv
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 5
    parameter \A_WIDTH 0
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y $auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A_buf
    connect \A $auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A
  end
```

Both ecp5 and xilinx hit this.
code_blocks:
ERROR: Found error in internal cell \rotator.$auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A_conv ($pos) at kernel/rtlil.cc:867:
  attribute \module_not_derived 1
  attribute \src "/home/anton_unencrypted/yosys/share/ecp5/arith_map.v:39.69-39.94"
  cell $pos $auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A_conv
    parameter \Y_WIDTH 5
    parameter \A_WIDTH 0
    parameter \A_SIGNED 0
    connect \Y $auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A_buf
    connect \A $auto$alumacc.cc:485:replace_alu$1048.A
  end
